notes: CodificationAs enacted, , , , originally transferred sections 2371 and 2371b of this title to sections 4002 and 4003, respectively, to become effective . Subsequently, , , , amended , effective as if included therein, so as to eliminate those transfers, thereby omitting these sections before they took effect.
